handoffs.condition: Narrative framing is trace-linked and the requested scope stays inside the current service contract boundary.
handoffs.evidence_gate: intent_ref and evidence_ref are both present.

handoffs.condition: The UX evidence brief and planning packet name target states, friction points, and first-session clarity checks.
handoffs.evidence_gate: trace_ref captures the proposed interaction delta.

handoffs.condition: Interaction flow proposals preserve the existing ritual state machine and keep desktop-mobile parity bounded.
handoffs.evidence_gate: proposal_ref includes the interaction flow spec.

handoffs.condition: Visual modulation changes remain inside rendering budget and preserve emotional differentiation across the declared states.
handoffs.evidence_gate: proposal_ref includes the visual modulation brief.

handoffs.condition: Approval tier is confirmed and any escalation or human gate requirement is explicitly recorded.
handoffs.evidence_gate: proposal_ref and policy verdict are both attached.
